title: ORGAN REGISTRY — Streaming + ML organs (operational topology)
doctrine: Algorithms can rank/gate/score/route; they cannot write truth. No organ here writes canonical graph tables. River/Bytewax stage learning facts and advisory hints only.
scope: lucidota_state (LUCIDOTA_GO_STATE_DSN). Learning rows under lucidota_learning.*; advisory facts under lucidota_control.runtime_status_fact.
topology_summary: Bytewax mini reads new lucidota_control.workflow_event rows via an advisory-locked cursor, scores each through 26 in-memory Treelite GTIL routers, and writes lucidota_learning.bytewax_hint rows. The same worker loop then ticks lucidota_river_reflex, which trains a River OneHot+LogisticRegression online on (source,phase,decision)->succeeded and upserts lucidota_learning.river_score. Both are driven by the lucidota-stream-river systemd user service (10s cadence) — but that service is currently FAILING because it execs bare python3 (no psycopg) instead of .venv. The only ML organ actually training right now is the River governor (539 samples, fact refreshed today) called inline from indy_corpus_crush.

organs.purpose: Live cursor dataflow over workflow_event; emits per-event routing hints scored by an in-memory Treelite router matrix.
organs.inputs: lucidota_control.workflow_event rows newer than lucidota_learning.river_event_cursor['bytewax_live'] (advisory xact lock 'lucidota_bytewax_live_cursor'); falls back to latest-N window when not --live-cursor.
organs.outputs: lucidota_learning.bytewax_hint (one row/event), lucidota_learning.bytewax_stream_run (run receipt), cursor advance.
organs.predicts: advisory routing score 0-100 per event (avg of 26 treelite router outputs; capped at 40 when event status != succeeded).
organs.update_cadence: Per stream tick. Driven by lucidota-stream-river service every SLEEP_SECONDS=10 (BYTEWAX_LIMIT=250). Service currently failing, so no live ticks.
organs.receipt_or_trainproof: lucidota_learning.bytewax_stream_run rows = 0; lucidota_learning.bytewax_hint rows = 0. NO trainproof — never produced a row in this DB. Schema in 06_SCHEMA/007_bytewax_stream.sql.
organs.training_provenance: No training: the 26 routers are hand-built GTIL stumps (deterministic), not learned. Embeds Treelite at runtime (treelite.gtil + model_builder).
organs.runtime_call_path: lucidota_stream_river_worker.sh -> python scripts/lucidota_bytewax_mini.py --live-cursor; also invoked by absurd_river_worker.py (legacy river_bytewax_health_check job) and lucidota_usecase_proof.py.
organs.graph_safety: read_only on workflow_event; receipt_only writer into lucidota_learning. Never touches canonical graph or temporal tables.
organs.next_action: Fix lucidota-stream-river.service to exec .venv/bin/python (it currently dies on 'No module named psycopg'); then bytewax_stream_run/bytewax_hint will populate.

organs.purpose: Online incremental learner over new workflow events; learns success likelihood per (source,phase,decision) and persists rolling success-rate scores.
organs.inputs: New lucidota_control.workflow_event rows (status in succeeded/failed) since cursor 'river_reflex_live'.
organs.outputs: lucidota_learning.river_score (upsert per source/phase/decision), lucidota_learning.river_run (tick receipt), cursor advance.
organs.predicts: P(event succeeded) via River compose.Pipeline(OneHotEncoder -> LogisticRegression); stored as river_prediction alongside empirical success_rate.
organs.update_cadence: Per stream tick (RIVER_REFLEX_LIMIT=5000) every 10s via lucidota-stream-river. NOTE: model is re-instantiated each invocation (not persisted) — only aggregate counts in river_score persist across ticks; the LogisticRegression weights do NOT.
organs.receipt_or_trainproof: lucidota_learning.river_run rows = 37, max(created_at)=2026-05-28 04:03:20 (real ticks happened, e.g. via absurd_river_worker, not the failing systemd unit). lucidota_learning.river_score rows = 1, updated_at=2026-05-28 04:03:20. Trainproof present but thin. Schema 06_SCHEMA/004_learning_reflex.sql, wrapper schema 038_absurd_river_wrapper.sql.
organs.training_provenance: Trained purely on LUCIDOTA's own workflow_event stream (self-telemetry). No external corpus.
organs.runtime_call_path: lucidota_stream_river_worker.sh -> python scripts/lucidota_river_reflex.py; also run by absurd_river_worker.py legacy river_bytewax_health_check tick.
organs.graph_safety: read_only on workflow_event; receipt_only/candidate writer into lucidota_learning. No graph/temporal mutation (wrapper asserts canonical+temporal counts unchanged).
organs.next_action: Fix the systemd venv bug. Consider persisting the River pipeline (pickle) so logistic weights survive across ticks instead of relearning aggregate-only each run.

organs.purpose: Machine governor: River HoeffdingTreeRegressor + ADWIN drift detector learns optimal batch_size from hardware telemetry; writes a queryable RULE fact any flow/LLM can read.
organs.inputs: hw_state from lucidota_hw_gate.read_hw_state(): ram_avail_mb, vram_used_pct, cpu_load_per_core, disk_used_pct; plus observed throughput_per_sec and oom flag fed by callers.
organs.predicts: recommended_batch_size (regression, clamped 1..64; cold-start = 2*cpu_count until n_samples>=5). ADWIN resets the tree on throughput drift.
organs.update_cadence: On-demand: learn() after each processed batch, predict() before each batch. No daemon, no polling.
organs.receipt_or_trainproof: LIVE TRAINPROOF: runtime_status_fact river_governor/batch_recommendation = {n_samples:539, throughput_input:48.38, recommended_batch_size:64, drift_detected:false}, derived_at=2026-05-28 14:56:49 (today). Model pkl 14KB on disk. This is the ONLY ML organ in this shard actually training.
organs.training_provenance: Trained online from real corpus-crush batch telemetry observed during indy_corpus_crush loops (539 samples accumulated).
organs.runtime_call_path: scripts/indy_corpus_crush.py imports predict()/learn() inline around each batch; scripts/indy_cache_copypasta.py reads the batch_recommendation fact. Model.__main__ self-seeds one sample.
organs.graph_safety: candidate/receipt writer into runtime_status_fact only (advisory RULE fact). No graph/temporal/custody mutation. Cannot write truth.
organs.next_action: Healthy. Keep as-is. Best-functioning organ in the shard; good reference pattern (persisted River model + queryable fact) for fixing river_reflex persistence.

organs.purpose: Durable user service that loops bytewax_mini then river_reflex every 10s — the intended live bytewax->river spine.
organs.inputs: Runs lucidota_stream_river_worker.sh with BYTEWAX_LIMIT=250, RIVER_REFLEX_LIMIT=5000, SLEEP_SECONDS=10, DBOS_SYSTEM_DATABASE_URL=postgresql:///lucidota_state.
organs.receipt_or_trainproof: systemctl --user status = 'activating (auto-restart) (Result: exit-code)', last ExecStart exited status=1. Reproduced: worker dies with ModuleNotFoundError: No module named 'psycopg'.
organs.runtime_call_path: systemd user manager -> lucidota_stream_river_worker.sh (uses PY=${PYTHON:-python3}; resolves to system python3 which lacks deps; .venv not activated).
organs.graph_safety: Inherits receipt_only safety of its children.
organs.next_action: BIGGEST OPERATIONAL GAP. Set Environment=PYTHON=/home/mfspx/LUCIDOTA/.venv/bin/python in the unit (or ExecStart through the venv). Until fixed, the advertised bytewax->river live spine produces zero rows.

organs.purpose: ABSURD/Postgres queue-spine wrapper that dequeues jobs and ticks river_reflex+bytewax_mini (legacy health-check) OR runs GLiNER zero-shot extraction (phase05 streaming brain). Contract-gated at dequeue.
organs.inputs: absurd.phase05_streaming_brain queue (gliner_zero_shot_extract / gliner_claim_packet_extract) and legacy 'river' queue (river_bytewax_health_check). KORPUS components for GLiNER.
organs.outputs: lucidota_learning.gliner_extraction_run, gliner_entity_span (graph-promotion candidates), absurd queue events/dead-letters, workflow_event receipts.
features: GLiNER zero-shot entity labels (Operator, KORPUS, Chrono-Ledger, Command Envelope Protocol, ...)
organs.predicts: Named-entity spans (graph-promotion candidates only) for the GLiNER job; health booleans for the legacy tick job.
organs.update_cadence: On dequeue (worker-once / FOR UPDATE SKIP LOCKED). Not a continuous loop itself.
organs.receipt_or_trainproof: Reports under 05_OUTPUTS/absurd/absurd_river_wrapper_*.json. river_run rows (37) are the proof this path has ticked river_reflex. Schemas 038_absurd_river_wrapper.sql, 073_absurd_river_claim_packet_job.sql.
organs.training_provenance: GLiNER is a pretrained model (03_VAULT/models/gliner/urchade_gliner_small-v2.1), not trained here. River tick trains on workflow_event.
organs.runtime_call_path: ABSURD queue dequeue -> validate_worker_contract -> river_bytewax_health()/gliner_streaming_brain()/claim_packet_extract(); subprocesses run via .venv python (python_bin resolves .venv correctly — unlike the systemd unit).
organs.graph_safety: candidate_writer: spans are graph_promotion_candidate=true, never written to canonical graph; asserts canonical+temporal counts unchanged and dead-letters on violation.
organs.next_action: This is the correct, contract-safe path and resolves .venv properly. Prefer routing the live stream through ABSURD here rather than relying on the broken systemd loop.

organs.purpose: Bytewax dataflow over Project-2501 board-move events; advisory board-effect streaming.
organs.outputs: Board stream learning/effect rows in lucidota_learning / board tables.
organs.receipt_or_trainproof: No fresh receipt confirmed; service project2501-bytewax-board-stream.service is DISABLED + INACTIVE.
organs.runtime_call_path: project2501_bytewax_board_stream_service.py installs the unit; bytewax_absurd_stream_audit.py / bytewax_db_os_stream_audit.py / full_system_soak_audit.py / lucidota_omni_front_sprint_orchestrator.py reference it.
organs.graph_safety: receipt_only into learning tables; no canonical graph writes.
organs.next_action: Secondary stream, currently not running (service disabled). Leave paused unless board-effect telemetry is needed; do not auto-enable.

organs.purpose: Compiles dev-journey receipts/logs/handoffs into weak-labeled decision points and trains an XGBoost classifier + Treelite export for route prediction (advisory ML substrate).
organs.inputs: GOAL_LOG.md, CURRENT_HANDOFF.md, STATUS_LEDGER.md, ACTIVE_INSTRUCTION_INDEX.md, SCRIPT_AUDIT_MANIFEST.jsonl, hunch hypertimeline, board-move + krampuschewing receipts (default_sources()).
organs.outputs: 05_OUTPUTS/dev_journey_decision_points/models/dev_journey_route_xgboost_*.json and *_treelite_*.tl; receipt JSON; CSV/JSONL; updates big_board.json.
features: 20-col sticker+term vector: chars, words, imperative/imagination/audit/graph/model/workflow/receipt/slop/test/hedge terms, board_effect_count, operator_directive_ratio, operator_ledger_density, operator_tech_ratio, resilience_swarm_orchestration_density, telemetry_agent_symmetry/protocol/manic
organs.predicts: route_class in {EXPLORE_WORKFLOW, EXPLOIT_BUILD, AUDIT_PROOF, MODEL_ROUTE, GRAPH_STAGE, STOP_OR_QUARANTINE} (multi:softprob / binary:logistic).
organs.update_cadence: On-demand only (run with --train). No service, no scheduler. Last artifacts dated 2026-05-27.
organs.receipt_or_trainproof: Trainproof on disk: 4 artifacts in 05_OUTPUTS/dev_journey_decision_points/models/ (2 xgboost .json boosters ~87-89KB, 2 treelite .tl ~80-82KB), receipt dev_journey_decision_points_receipt_20260527T021326165553Z.json. NOT loaded by any runtime caller.
organs.training_provenance: XGBClassifier(n_estimators<=24, max_depth=3, lr=0.25, seed=414) trained on weak-labeled dev-journey corpus; Treelite from_xgboost export; GTIL smoke-predict only.
organs.runtime_call_path: NONE. No caller imports or executes dev_journey_decision_points outside its own __main__. Artifacts are trained but never loaded for inference.
organs.graph_safety: read_only inputs; writes only file receipts + big_board.json. Declared advisory_training_candidate, no graph writes.
organs.next_action: Real XGBoost+Treelite artifacts exist but are dead-ended — nothing performs inference with them. Either wire route prediction into a gate/router or mark the artifacts as reference. Currently produces trained models nobody reads.

organs.purpose: Tiny Treelite routing-hint proof: builds a 3-feature stump, serializes to vault, predicts, persists advisory route.
organs.predicts: route in {survey-hop-promote, metadata-only} from a single threshold leaf.
organs.receipt_or_trainproof: lucidota_learning.treelite_router_run rows = 0 in current DB — proof never persisted here. Vault artifact treelite_router_v0.tl exists (487B, 2026-05-19). Schema scripts/06_SCHEMA/009_treelite_router.sql.
organs.runtime_call_path: Lives under scripts/legacy/. No active caller (the treelite_router string matches in bytewax_mini/abductive_blender refer to the inline router matrix, not this script).
organs.next_action: Superseded by the inline 26-router matrix in bytewax_mini and by dev_journey treelite artifacts. Archive to KRAMPUSCHEWING/Script_Corpses with hash; capability preserved by the newer organs.

organs.purpose: Operator-trained XGBoost+Treelite strategy models for the board game 'Ahoy' (data under /home/mfspx/BOARD_GAMES/AHOY/). NOT a LUCIDOTA runtime organ.
organs.inputs: /home/mfspx/BOARD_GAMES/AHOY/ board-game training data (external to LUCIDOTA spine).
organs.outputs: Ahoy strategy treelite/xgboost artifacts (ahoy_train_strategy_xgboost.py, ahoy_export_strategy_treelite.py, ahoy_apply_xgboost_treelite.py, ahoy_train_xgboost_shap.py).
organs.training_provenance: Operator trained these off the board game 'Ahoy' (/home/mfspx/BOARD_GAMES/AHOY/). Personal/board-game lab, not LUCIDOTA telemetry.
organs.runtime_call_path: NONE in LUCIDOTA spine. Already foldered under KRAMPUSCHEWING/Paused_AHOY with SHA256SUMS.txt.
organs.graph_safety: Isolated; not wired to any LUCIDOTA gate or graph.
organs.next_action: RECORD ONLY — do not act on or wire. Already correctly foldered/paused in KRAMPUSCHEWING/Paused_AHOY with hashes. Recommend it stays there; BOARD_GAMES/AHOY data is the operator's board-game corpus, unrelated to the streaming spine. Do not start its trainers.

live_training_models: lucidota_river_governor (River HoeffdingTreeRegressor, 539 samples, fact updated today)
tree_inventory.wired_into_runtime_inference: NONE of the persisted tree/booster artifacts are loaded for inference. The only trees executing at runtime are (a) the River governor regressor (active, via indy_corpus_crush) and (b) the 26 in-memory hand-built GTIL stumps inside bytewax_mini (rebuilt each run, not persisted, and only when the stream runs). The dev_journey XGBoost/Treelite .json/.tl files are trained but dead-ended; legacy treelite_router is a corpse; AHOY is reference-only and out of scope.
tree_inventory.ahoy_note: AHOY = the board game 'Ahoy'; operator trained treelites off /home/mfspx/BOARD_GAMES/AHOY/. Recorded for awareness only. Already foldered/paused in KRAMPUSCHEWING/Paused_AHOY. Do NOT wire or act on it.

biggest_operational_gap: The advertised live bytewax->river spine does not run: lucidota-stream-river.service is in auto-restart failure because lucidota_stream_river_worker.sh execs bare python3 (no psycopg in system env) instead of /home/mfspx/LUCIDOTA/.venv/bin/python. As a result bytewax_stream_run and bytewax_hint have 0 rows ever, and river_score has only 1 row. The fix is one line: set PYTHON/Environment to the venv interpreter (the ABSURD path absurd_river_worker.py already resolves .venv correctly and is the safer route).
